generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder on the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleTransmission, SpeedTransmission, AccelerationTransmission
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleTransmission, SpeedTransmission
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current measurement from the robot controller for the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentTransmission, TorqueTransmission
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance AngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance SpeedTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance AccelerationTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance CurrentTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance AxisAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational angle trace of the first axis (derived from encoder signals)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AxisSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular speed trace of the first axis (derived from encoder signals)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AxisAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration trace of the first axis (derived from encoder signals)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AxisCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor phase current trace streamed from the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AxisTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque trace (computed from current and motor parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers (tools & infrastructure)
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural and functional engineering models"
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for executable friction and drivetrain simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, RealTimeSimulationComparisonService, AutomaticParameterUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real‑time streaming of sensor traces from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS component linking engineering models with live data for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for visualizing data traces and model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C10: Models / Data (Engineering & Simulation)
instance SysMLMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition model of the gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLRotationalPortModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram of the rotational ports connecting motor and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessDrivetrainModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the drivetrain without friction (baseline for identification)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑viscous friction for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Dahl friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueSpeedCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model that generates torque and speed traces from sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C6: Services provided by the digital shadow
instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies white‑box and black‑box friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance RealTimeSimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time comparison of simulated vs. measured torque and speed for model validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight
]

instance AutomaticParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic update of robot control parameters based on identified friction values"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualizing all data traces, identified parameters and model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationAction
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into magnitude of friction losses on the first axis derived from identification service"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that updated friction parameters improve motion accuracy of the robot"
]

instance ModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing deviation between simulated and measured torque/speed in real time"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of the robot control algorithm with newly identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑triggered visualization of friction losses and model deviations on the web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data acquisition and processing occur in real time during robot operation; sensor streams are ingested continuously via MQTT and processed by simulation models to provide up‑to‑date friction estimates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is realized as a concrete instantiation of the Digital Shadow Reference Model comprising the purpose (FrictionDerivation), the asset (MABI robot first axis), data traces (e.g., I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out and their simulated counterparts), processing components that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, and engineering, simulation and data‑calculation models that interconnect them."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "All data points are traceable to their source and processing component; friction models are validated by subtracting simulated friction from the frictionless model and comparing against measured torque and speed; both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) models are continuously re‑identified to maintain accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell framework is used to bind data traces to model elements, ensuring semantic consistency."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation utilizes the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for Industry 4.0 interoperability and follows SysML modeling conventions."
]
